title: IIT Kanpur Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Project Associate Posts
description: Indian Institute of Technology (IIT) Kanpur has declared the official notification for 2026. To fill up the various vacancies for Project Associate I Jobs. Candidates who have qualified in the B.E/ B.Tech, M.E/ M.Tech, and MCA can grab this chance and apply for the IIT Kanpur Recruitment 2026 . Here we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, applciation fee, and how to apply for these posts.
